task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the campaign with the correct ID, Name, Active status, and User Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Vicidial Campaign creation or modification screen showing Campaign ID 'CB_SAFE', Campaign Name 'Callback Compliance Force', Active set to 'Y', and User Group set to 'ADMIN'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Scheduled Callbacks are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Enable Scheduled Callbacks' setting in the campaign detail screen and ensure it is set to 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Scheduled Callbacks Alert and Scheduled Callbacks Count settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Scheduled Callbacks Alert' set to 'BLINK' and 'Scheduled Callbacks Count' set to 'LIVE' in the campaign settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the Scheduled Callbacks Days Limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Scheduled Callbacks Days Limit' text field in the campaign settings and ensure it contains the value '14'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Max Scheduled Callbacks setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Max Scheduled Callbacks' text field in the campaign settings and ensure it contains the value '50'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Agent Only Callbacks Limitation setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Agent Only Callbacks Limitation' setting in the campaign detail screen and ensure it is set to 'Y'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Vicidial web GUI to configure the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vicidial administration interface, not a terminal window executing MySQL queries or curl commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the settings were actually applied/saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message like 'CAMPAIGN MODIFIED' or 'CAMPAIGN ADDED' at the top of the Vicidial admin screen, or the agent clicking the 'Submit' button.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected values into a text editor to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the actual HTML form fields of the Vicidial Campaign configuration page, not a notepad, text editor, or empty browser tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The campaign must be created with ID 'CB_SAFE' and Name 'Callback Compliance Force'. The required configuration values are: Active: 'Y', User Group: 'ADMIN', Enable Scheduled Callbacks: 'Y', Scheduled Callbacks Alert: 'BLINK', Scheduled Callbacks Count: 'LIVE', Scheduled Callbacks Days Limit: '14', Max Scheduled Callbacks: '50', and Agent Only Callbacks Limitation: 'Y'.
